title: オーケー！ユーもフレンズでーす☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day arrives with Taiki Shuttle still believing she's been
scouted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thinking it wrong to recruit someone based on a misunderstanding, I
set out in hopes of breaking the news to her gently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a bit of searching, I find Taiki in the courtyard with a couple of
other students.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Okay, Fukukitaru—ready as I'll ever be! Tell me what ya see in your vision!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Pri-pri, mero-mero, starry-cup... O great Shiraoki, bestow upon me
your wisdom!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...I've got it! Listen and be amazed, Taiki! Your lucky direction for this
month is... east-southeast!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yes! That's just the answer I needed, Fukukitaru!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So Suzuka, let's have the party somewhere to the east-south-south...
east-east? Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The east-southeast, wasn't it? I'm not sure what direction the
east-south-south-east-east would be...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, now—no use getting hung up on the details!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whatever the case, Suzuka, it's gonna be a good time!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Come to my barbecue party, and I'll feed ya till your body's all soft
and squishy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Th-that's a kind offer, but I'm not sure I want to be soft and squishy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm really happy for you, Taiki! Congratulations on finding
a trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Fukukitaru! Hope to see ya there too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm wanna invite as many friends as I can. 'Cause ya know what they
say—the more the happier!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Taiki chatting cheerfully with her classmates, it's plain to see
that she's a bright and friendly individual.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I just wanted to tell ya how much I'm looking forward to our
training session today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And, well... People tell me I can be a smidge unfocused, but don't ya
worry! I'm gonna give it the good ol' college try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her boundless enthusiasm makes it all the more difficult to turn her
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But a decision must be made...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You bet! Thanks for taking me under your wing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thus, our first training session together begins. However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzuka! Howdy!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah, Taiki—wait, stop! Please don't pounce on me, okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Well, that's too bad. Hugs are a sign of affection, ya know.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yours are a bit like being hit by a truck. Actually, aren't you supposed
to be training right now?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, I clean forgot!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for runnin' out on ya all of a sudden, Trainer! Soon as I spotted
Suzuka, my legs just sort of went off on their own.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I know! Since you're here and all, why don't we train together,
Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What? W-well... Would that be all right with you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though completely unplanned, having someone with Silence Suzuka's
talent join our session would undoubtedly prove beneficial.
choice_data_list: Honestly, I'd consider it a favor.
Honestly, I'd consider it a favor.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay then. I was planning to do some distance training today, so
would you mind if we ventured off the school grounds?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Off the grounds?! That sounds like fun!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No problem at all! Let's go, go, go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hold on, Taiki. That was a question for your trainer...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Then it's off to the races! Yeehaaaaaw!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, wait!
S-see you in a bit!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait at the school gate for them to return, feeling only the slightest
bit apprehensive. Eventually, I hear the sound of footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... We're back.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, what?! I was sure she was right behind me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry! She has a habit of stopping to talk to everyone she meets, so
I meant to keep a close eye on her...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I have my own habit of getting tunnel vision whenever I run... I-I'm
really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suzuka and I search all along the running course for Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bang! Yes, another bullseye!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, I just heard her! I think she's over this way!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Ooh, me next! I wanna try! Show me how it's done!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just leave it to yours truly! Once ya learn my sharpshootin' skills,
you'll be just like a hero in a Western—toy pistol or not!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: There you are, Taiki! Thank goodness we found you!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if it ain't Suzuka! And Trainer too! Why're ya both so out of
breath?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, sorry! I totally forgot I was in the middle of running!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Taiki...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems the road ahead of us is going to be quite the bumpy one.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well... I made some cute friends, so... can ya p-please forgive me this
one time?!
